name: MCPHallu
description: MCPHallu is a benchmark for diagnosing hallucinations in MCP (Model Context Protocol) agents along three axes: reasoning, execution, and memory. It contains 358 tasks across five capability domains (General, Analytics, Productivity, Financial, Coding) and four hallucination subtypes (Branch Collapse, Unreachable Goal, Tool Misuse, Context Forgetting), evaluated against 36 production MCP servers running in isolated Docker containers.
rai:dataCollection: Tasks were constructed in three stages: (1) tool grounding from live MCP server schemas, (2) adversarial synthesis using Claude Sonnet 4.6 with subtype-specific prompts, and (3) automated filtering plus expert review by three annotators with 2+ years of LLM agent evaluation experience.
rai:dataUseCases: Benchmarking and diagnosing hallucination failure modes in LLM-based MCP agents; subtype-level attribution of reasoning, execution, and memory failures.
rai:dataBiases: The 36 MCP servers are English-language and primarily target Western SaaS APIs (GitHub, Notion, Slack, etc.). Findings may not generalize to regional services or non-English-language tools.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: No personal or sensitive information. All tasks are synthetic and constructed from public MCP server tool schemas.
rai:annotatorDemographics: Three annotators with backgrounds in LLM agent evaluation (each with 2+ years experience).

distribution.name: mcphallu_tasks.json
distribution.description: All 358 MCPHallu tasks in a single JSON array.

distribution.name: confusion_tasks.jsonl
distribution.description: 84 Tool Misuse tasks in JSONL format.

distribution.name: memory_tasks.jsonl
distribution.description: 82 Context Forgetting tasks in JSONL format.

distribution.name: reasoning_tasks.jsonl
distribution.description: 89 Branch Collapse tasks in JSONL format.

distribution.name: void_tasks.jsonl
distribution.description: 103 Unreachable Goal tasks in JSONL format.

recordSet.name: tasks
recordSet.description: Each record is one MCPHallu evaluation task.

field.name: bucket
field.description: Capability domain: GENERAL, ANALYTICS, PRODUCTIVITY, FINANCIAL, or CODING.

field.name: hallucination_type
field.description: Target subtype: Branch Collapse, Unreachable Goal, Tool Misuse, or Context Forgetting.

field.name: difficulty
field.description: Difficulty level: Easy, Medium, or Hard.

field.name: task
field.description: Natural-language instruction given to the MCP agent.

field.name: available_tools
field.description: List of MCP tool names available to the agent.

field.name: ground_truth
field.description: Ground truth specification: dynamic_script or state_assertions.

field.name: claims
field.description: Ordered claim graph encoding the dependency structure of the correct trajectory.

field.name: should_stop_early
field.description: Whether correct behavior is to stop early (Unreachable Goal tasks).
